flavorText: Smugglers turn stealth, concealment, deceit, and improvised tools into a complete survival package.

features.description: Always seem to have one more trick, stash, or backup item than anyone expected.
Disappear from the obvious angle and reappear where the heat is lower.
Create opportunities through deception, contraband, and quiet exchanges.
Turn visual clutter, terrain, and confusion into your preferred battlefield.
At your peak, pinning you down becomes one of the hardest jobs on the table.

smuggler-hidden-compartments.summary: Gain superior concealment, stash-space fantasy, and improvised resourcefulness.

smuggler-slip-away.summary: Break lines of sight and disengage with deceptive movement.

smuggler-shadow-transaction.summary: Leverage underworld instincts for infiltration, bribery, and setup scenes.

smuggler-smoke-and-salt.summary: Chaos and clutter become cover for your best turns.

smuggler-never-caught.summary: Your capstone is the fantasy of always having an exit and a backup plan.
